name: Crawfish Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions, garlic, bell pepper, and celery in butter until limp.
2. Add tomato sauce, crawfish tails, and parsley.
3. Cook slowly for 10 minutes.
4. Turn off heat.
5. Add bread crumbs, salt, pepper, egg, and milk; mix well.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes.
7. If you don't care for the delicious mud bugs, substitute shrimp.
